rag_rules: Use annex agree {**... **}; blocks for AGREE contracts
Place assumptions and guarantees in valid component type scopes
Place implementation-level bindings in implementation scopes
generic_rules: Use only visible AADL features or eq helpers declared in the same annex
Align helper declaration type with the expression
Use AGREE scalar declaration types int, real, and bool
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: annex agree {**... **}; blocks for AGREE contracts
eq pattern : bool = x >= min_value and x <= max_value;
anti_patterns: Introducing package-qualified identifiers, data types, or property references absent from the analyzed model
Using invalid or unresolved references in AGREE contracts
